title: 目標達成の後に・“三強”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, in the midst of Seiun Sky's leisurely race
schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be preparing for our next race, but
Sky is lounging around as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I go to wake her, when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I've found you, Sky!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hellooo... Hold it—she's still sleeping?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, it's fine. I've no doubt she's faking it. Isn't
that right, Sky?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Sky? Don't tell me you're actually asleep right now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mn... Nrgh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: SEIUN SKY!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, King... You don't have to yell. You're
gonna wake up the kids.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh no! My apolo—wait! There's no children here!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll stop messing around. Did you want
something?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Obviously! I'm here for a reason, and that is to
declare war!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: War...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Finally, we've set foot on racing's
noblest path, with the first battle for the Classic
Triple Crown set to begin!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You've got my attention. Keep going.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You, Special Week, and, most importantly, my
first-rate self...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The three of us, together, have been dubbed the
"big three"! Surely you've heard?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Since Grass Wonder is recuperating, she won't be
running in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And El Condor Pasa announced that she isn't
going to race for the crown.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In other words, in this year's Classic races—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will be watching us! Isn't that exciting,
Sei?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! We're not here for a friendly chat. We're
supposed to be lighting Sky's competitive spirit aflame!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! I got carried away...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Regardless! I shall be the one to claim the
Triple Crown this year!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh, p-pardon?! I believe you are mistaken! The
Triple Crown is going to none other than I!

text_block_list.name: Spe and King
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Two outta ten—not funny at all. You guys
should've practiced more on the way over.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This isn't a skit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After King Halo and Special Week leave...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why they wanted to do a comedy
sketch, but I agree a lot with what King said.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess it's about time for me to get off my butt.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Which means we're going for the Classic Triple
Crown. First up is the Satsuki Sho or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her tone doesn't convey it, she's set her
sights on a high target! The Classic Triple Crown
is an incredible honor for any racer, even her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure, extra effort...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Can't reel in a big fish without putting your back
into it. Maybe it's time to get serious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky's eyes glimmer with enthusiasm for a moment.
But the next second...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: As if! I'll just keep waiting for a bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this, Seiun Sky's campaign in the Classics
finally begins!
